CustomField.description: Recursion-guard marker. Set to TRUE by FscParityBatch on every write so that any future trigger or flow on this standard object can detect machine-written rows and skip them, preventing parity-loop scenarios.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-managed by FscParityBatch. TRUE means this row was written by the parity sync; downstream automation should not re-fire on these records.
CustomField.label: Is Parity Sync
